review_title: Orchestry: An Intuitive and Cost-Effective Solution for SharePoint and Teams Management
description: I find Orchestry to be a great product to work with; it is very intuitive. The user interface is clean and easy to navigate, which makes managing SharePoint and Teams environments a breeze. The integration with Entra ID for guest account management is seamless and addresses a common oversight among our clients. Additionally, the cost-benefit ratio is highly favorable, especially when compared to the high costs associated with Microsoft's SharePoint Premium or M365 E5 licenses. Overall, Orchestry enhances our productivity and simplifies complex tasks, making it an invaluable tool for our team and our proposition as an MSP.
author: Alwin P.
pros: I am very satisfied with the Orchestry Software for managing SharePoint and Teams environments. The management of guest accounts in Entra ID is also excellent, as this is something that is often overlooked by our clients.
cons: There are few things about Orchestry that I don't like, mainly because Microsoft charges a lot for many features through its SharePoint Premium or M365 E5 licenses. So, even when something doesn't work perfectly in Orchestry, it still offers a positive cost-benefit ratio.

review_title: Automate your site lifecycle where SharePoint cannot
description: User interface is excellent. Orchestry provides our clients with a way to automate the lifecycle of M365 workspaces and guests. Clients often don't have the knowledge internally to manage these functions.
author: Nick P.
pros: Automation of site and Teams creation and expiry Able to set default settings for new sites and Teams Automated guest management helps security. Cannot do this with OOTB M365.
cons: Some of the terminology used in the menu is not intuitve. E.g. Insights, Dashboard

review_title: Brilliant Product
description: Overall Orchestry is a product which is value adding to any business and it is a much more affordable product than others on the market. It is easy to demo, explain and deploy. Overall I love keeping up with the development enhancements and believe the roadmap for the product is exciting.
author: Yuvilen N.
pros: Not only does it provide the information businesses are looking for, but it provides the information in a way that can be consumed easily and have actionable recommendations.
cons: I can’t think of anything specifically. I think for me it was just the initial understanding of what Orchestry was but once I started using it, I was happy.

review_title: Supercharge Collaboration with Microsoft 365 and Orchestry
description: Fantastic we use it everyday as part of our business processes and we help our business improve there businesses and how they work with it too.
author: Simon D.
pros: How we can supercharge our Microsoft 365 Collaboration making it easy for customers to drive more value from Teams and SharePoint with automated site templates Protecting our customers with lifecycle management for guests and helping tidy up their workspaces.
cons: The webparts which come with Orchestry are pretty nice though there are some rough parts and I would like more configuration.

review_title: Orchestry Review
description: I work primarily in an Admin role when working with Orchestry. It provides everything I need to manage our environment securely, and I love that the app keeps growing.
author: Kevin L.
pros: The simplicity and easy to navigate interface. Fast response time on issues via the ticket system. Constant innovative development.
cons: I have a hard time trying to come up with something negative about Orchestry currently.

review_title: Orchestry Toolset review
description: We have had a very good experience with the product overall. The support that you get from the organization when you sign up is tremendous value in itself. Thank you
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I love the features and functionality this product offers as well as the ease of installation and setup. This is a great toolset to integrate into the Microsoft 365 stack to help manage content and stay organized.
cons: If there was a downside to the product it might be costs, but depending on the customer profile it tends to make sense financially in many different scenarios so this was pretty easy to digest and overcome as a business expense

review_title: Kascade and Orchestry
description: Great company to work with, especially from a sales process / demo etc
author: Jonathon P.
pros: it meets so many challenges that our customers are facing
cons: I dont think there is anything in particular I dont like. Might be worth asking my customers that use the software

review_title: Orchestry: A Comprehensive Solution for Microsoft 365
description: Overall, Orchestry Software offers a robust and user-friendly solution for managing Microsoft 365 environments. The automated governance features are a standout, helping to maintain compliance and streamline administrative tasks.
author: Supriya M.
pros: Intuitive User Interface: Orchestry's interface clean and easy to navigate, which simplifies managing SharePoint and Teams environments.
cons: Certain features are still on the roadmap and not yet available.

review_title: Great Product to make M365 Easy
description: Excellent customer success, partner team and overall functionality of the software
author: Casey K.
pros: Ease of use, incredibly useful and quick support, and obvious ROI for the team.
cons: Not much I can say about anything is disliked so far

review_title: Will make your SharePoint infrastructure sing!
description: When my organization started working with Orchestry, the software wasn't as polished as it is today - they've put a lot of work into it, and it shows. I'd recommend it to anyone who needs the feature set.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The software works as described, and that's great, but what separates Orchestry from their competition is the experience of working with their people. Friendly, competent, forthright are words that come to mind - you'll get the right answer as quickly as possible if you have a question.
cons: Well, it's not cheap, but the feature set justifies the price.

review_title: A good product
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I like the health checks because they provide a very clear and automated way to assess the governance, security, and overall health of your Microsoft 365 environment, particularly with tools like Teams, SharePoint, and the Power Platform.
cons: It may introduce challenges for smaller organizations or teams with limited technical expertise. Also, for environments with smaller governance needs it might be overly complex.

review_title: Orchestry continues to improve, which benefits us all
description: Overall, Orchestry is a very positive experience coming from the simple user interface which is built for end-users, alongside the templating capability, renewals, governance and more. I would recommend Orchestry to others who are looking to automate Microsoft 365 governance.
author: Scott B.
pros: Orchestry was and is a great tool to help with provisioning Group-Enabled content within Microsoft 365, being Microsoft Teams, SharePoint Sites and more. However, over the last six months, we have seen more enhancements come into the product, around health check capabilities and the ability to enrol and manage guest accounts. With these changes, in my opinion, it improves the product capability of Orchestry and goes way beyond the original purpose of provisioning Group-Enabled content in Microsoft 365, which benefits all Orchestry customers.
cons: Whilst most updates are done automatically, there are some updates which require administrator rights and we often miss them, which is our own fault, but ideally it would be great to have automatic notifications when administrator rights are required to update Orchestry.

review_title: Fantastic
description: It was amazing experience everything was so smooth and easy to understand
author: yash Y.
pros: The customer resolution speed is really impressive
cons: How they handle request and try to explain each and every detail thoroughly

review_title: Awesome product for M365 governance, lifecycle management, and collaboration standardization
description: We have used Orchestry for many years and have installed it at multiple organizations. The software itself is well designed, easy to install and configure. It is fully featured, allowing us to execute on M365 governance and lifecycle management best practices. The Orchestry team is very knowledgeable and provides excellent support.
author: Andrew W.
pros: There are a lot of features we use often, for both our M365 environment and customer environments. The lifecycle management and governance features are most useful, as they provide simple workflows to keep our environment organized, clean, and secure. This allows us to enforce Microsoft best practices, leading to a much better admin and end user experience. The templating and guest management features are also critical for keeping our M365 environment standardized and secure. The built-in features allow us to save money on Microsoft licensing.
cons: We have no issues with Orchestry. It is easy to install, configure, and use.
author_profession: Sr. Director of Modern Work and AI

review_title: Wonderful company, application, and team!
description: Phenomenal in all respects!
author: Michael M.
pros: Orchestry is an all-around great company. Not only do they have a phenomenal application that fills so many voids in governance and adoption of MS Teams and SharePoint, they are wonderful to work with. They listen to the user, they are extremely responsive, transparent, innovative, and they have the best people working with them.
cons: I'd like to be able to receive API responses from the Orchestry API calls, allowing us to use Power Automate to do even more with the provisioned workspace after Orchestry has completed its work.

review_title: Easy to use with room to grow
description: It's been great. There are still a ton of features that we hope to implement, but even with just the base installation and a few simple customizations, it has been a big help.
author: Michael K.
pros: It's extremely easy to setup and get going. There also a ton of features that you can gradually roll out as you get used to the tool and want to make your environment more robust. For example, there are webhooks you can setup so that as you generate new teams, you can build off that event and add more custom automation. Also, the feature where you put ownership of external users in the hands of the team's owners is great.
cons: Currently the admins get a ton of notifications. I think it would make sense to have separate fields for administration and notifications. Also, it would be nice to specify who gets notified on certain events. So maybe the admins get notified on errors, but general notifications go to a separate email.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: It does what it says and does it very well!
description: Managing Teams sprawl and controlling guests
author: Anthony C.
pros: Excellent functionality for Team and Guest Management
cons: Nothing - It does what it says and does it very well

review_title: love this product
description: super
author: Maarten V.
pros: easy of use, just having an amazing user interface, which is so easy to use.
cons: show me missing features, but many are on the road map

review_title: Orchestry is one of the best solution in Guest Management along with other key features
author: Raj Kumar G.
pros: Quick and easy way of deploying templates, allowing users an option to request the right template thus reducing overall Teams/sites Sprawl
cons: Blocked words for Team/site name does not validate if there is a word as contains or part of the entire sentence.

review_title: Teams Governance made easy
description: Overall experience is great, when giving a demo to customers they tend to say I want this immediately.
author: Mike F.
pros: These easy of use of all the features within Orchestry is great , most functionality is almost self explaining.
cons: Role based access to certain functionalities would be great. E.g. only have access to the external user management f.i.

review_title: My product of choice for Teams management
author: Joel R.
pros: The amount of features provided is just unbelievable, amazing tool to keep your Teams under control.
cons: The discussion with clients regarding the level of Azure AD permissions required by the app. In big organisations, the approval of Azure AD application permissions is often managed by a different team other than the one using the product and sometimes it leads to long discussions until permissions are approved.

review_title: Newer user
author: Angela J.
pros: Ease of use and ability to see things that cannot be seen out of the box.
cons: Look forward to seeing the Edu side grow.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A great product to work with
author: Eleni B.
pros: Orchestry is loved for how easy and user-friendly it makes Microsoft 365 management! It helps prevent Teams and SharePoint sprawl with pre-built templates, automated approvals, and smart lifecycle policies. With Orchestry, IT gains better control while users enjoy an easy, self-service experience—boosting productivity and keeping M365 environments clean, secure, and efficient. Thank you Orchestry team :)
cons: Orchestry can be on the pricier side, especially for smaller organizations. The value it provides is great, but the cost may be a concern for some companies.

review_title: Orchestry software a robust and secure solution for organization utilizing Teams and SharePoint
description: Orchestry software provides robust solution to handle the day to day tasks of an admins or as a user. It is incorporates processes and removing barriers by simplifying the governance and lifecycle management of SharePoint and Teams.
author: Adrian T.
pros: Great app to facilitate workspace creation using predefine or customisable templates. User friendly and easy to manage. The app integration and business process continuity to other 3rd party application is a major leap as it can streamline or custom fit your need.
cons: None so far however looking forward for the app to extend on other M365 and Azure areas.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: My Orchestry Experience
description: Overall, I have found Orchestry to be a positive and intuitive experience. The software has a clean user interface, which makes managing SharePoint and Teams environments straightforward. Additionally, the integration with Entra ID for guest account management is seamless and that is appreciated.
author: Chris G.
pros: Orchestry software offers ease of use, robust functionality, and excellent customer support
cons: It can take some time to fully understand and utilize all its features
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
